FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Settlement Cost Change
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Changes settlement costs to be primarily based on distance, and adds resource costs as well.

patchNoteLines.li: Settlement costs are based on distance instead of number of settlements in the empire
After founding a configurable number of settlements (default 3), further settlements require resources in addition to silver

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Performance Improvement
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Improves performance of the new distance-based settlement cost calculations.

patchNoteLines.li: Uses caching to cut down on pathfinding checks
